mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notifications (id, user_id, trip_id, type, title, body, data, actor_id, is_read, created_at) VALUES (#{id,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{userId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{tripId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{type}, #{title}, #{body}, #{data,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{actorId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, FALSE, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifications WHERE user_id = #{userId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER} AND is_read = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE notifications SET is_read = TRUE WHERE id = #{id,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}
UPDATE notifications SET is_read = TRUE WHERE user_id = #{userId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM notifications WHERE user_id = #{userId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER} AND is_read = FALSE ORDER BY created_at DESC
